notes: I coded and wrote along with the tutorial. Now the next section is Event handlers. I learnt about objects and how similar they are to dictionaries and how you use dot notation to access its properties. Also learnt about the map method that comes with arrays in JavaScript. It essentially takes the value that will be embodied by the parameter that the map function will take and then whatever process is done it will return something new which will then be the new value. It does this by going through each element in the array and doing something to it that results in a new value. Wordy, sheesh.
